description: Folderly is an email deliverability platform that analyzes your sending infrastructure, monitors spam placement, and fixes issues to keep email in the inbox.
overview: Folderly improves email deliverability by analyzing infrastructure, IPs, and DNS, monitoring spam placement in real time, and giving actionable fixes to protect sender reputation.
what_is: Folderly is an email deliverability tool that helps teams reach the inbox instead of spam. It analyzes and fixes email placement, IP, and DNS issues, with real-time monitoring and alerts that protect sender reputation and campaign performance.

It is strongest at email warm-up, troubleshooting inbox issues, and tracking email health, with improvements in deliverability and reply rates often appearing soon after setup. It is built for teams that treat deliverability as ongoing maintenance.

Folderly integrates via API and SMTP with major email providers to fit a CRM and email-marketing stack. It is not a bulk sender or campaign platform itself; it focuses purely on deliverability and inbox placement.
